selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: prep. 在...之中
words.definition: prep. Alt. of Amongst

words.translation: a. 通常的, 共同的, 通俗的, 公共的
words.definition: a. belonging to or participated in by a community as a whole; public

words.translation: n. 动物
words.definition: n. a living organism characterized by voluntary movement

words.translation: n. 切口, 割伤, 降低, 切, 割, 砍, 削, 伤口, 削减, 缩短, 删节, 通路；a. 经切割的, 缩减的
words.definition: n. a share of the profits

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: a. 几个的, 一些的, 各自的；pron. 几个
words.definition: s. (used with count nouns) of an indefinite number more than 2 or 3 but not many

words.translation: n. 皮肤, 皮；vt. 剥皮, 在...植皮
words.definition: n. a natural protective body covering and site of the sense of touch

words.translation: n. 地球, 泥土, 世界, 尘世；vt. 埋入土中, 赶入洞内
words.definition: n. the 3rd planet from the sun; the planet we live on

words.translation: n. 大小, 尺寸, 规模, 尺码, 能力, 浆料；vt. 上浆, 依大小排列
words.definition: n. the physical magnitude of something (how big it is)

words.translation: n. 变化, 找回的零钱, 找头, 更换；vt. 改变, 更换, 兑换
words.definition: n. an event that occurs when something passes from one state or phase to another

words.translation: n. 苍蝇, 两翼昆虫, 飞行；vi. 飞, 飞翔, 飘扬, 逃走
words.definition: n. two-winged insects characterized by active flight

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
n. 勤劳, 工业, 企业, 产业, 有组织的劳动
words.definition: n. the people or companies engaged in a particular kind of commercial enterprise

words.translation: n. 种类, 性质, 方式；a. 亲切的, 仁慈的, 和蔼的
words.definition: n. a category of things distinguished by some common characteristic or quality

words.translation: n. 球, 舞会, 球状物；v. 捏成球形
words.definition: n. round object that is hit or thrown or kicked in games

words.translation: n. 领域, 田地, 场地, 战场, 场, 域；vt. 使...晒在场上, 使上场
words.definition: n. a piece of land cleared of trees and usually enclosed

words.translation: n. 夏季, 全盛时期；vi. 避暑, 过夏天
words.definition: n. the warmest season of the year; in the northern hemisphere it extends from the summer solstice to the autumnal equinox

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: a. 暖和的, 暖的, 温暖的, 热烈的, 兴奋的, 激烈的, 多情的, 色情的；vt. 使温暖, 弄热, 使兴奋, 使充满仇恨
words.definition: a. having or producing a comfortable and agreeable degree of heat or imparting or maintaining heat

words.translation: n. 昆虫, 卑鄙的人
words.definition: n. small air-breathing arthropod

words.translation: n. 空气, 旋律, 态度；vt. 晾, 使通风, 夸耀
words.definition: n. a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of

words.translation: adv. 几乎, 差不多
vi. 出现, 显得, 来到
words.definition: v. come into sight or view

words.translation: n. 黑色, 黑颜料；a. 黑色的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of least lightness (bearing the least resemblance to white)

words.translation: n. 身体, 人, 尸体, 主要部分, 团体；vt. 赋以形体
words.definition: n. the entire structure of an organism (an animal, plant, or human being)

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: n. 班级, 阶级, 种类, 课；vt. 分类
words.definition: n. a collection of things sharing a common attribute

words.translation: n. 颜色, 面色, 颜料, 外貌；vt. 把...涂上颜色, 粉饰, 使脸红, 歪曲
v. 考虑, 思考, 认为

words.translation: vi. 死亡, 消逝, 平息, 熄灭, 漠然, 渴望；vt. 死
words.definition: v. pass from physical life and lose all bodily attributes and functions necessary to sustain life

words.translation: n. 食物, 养料

words.translation: n. 脚, 步调, 英尺, 底部, 末尾, 步兵；vt. 走在...上, 给...换底, 支付

words.translation: vt. 种植, 使长满；vi. 生长, 变成, 发展

words.translation: n. 历史, 过去, 经历, 发展过程, 历史学, 过去的事, 历史记录

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: n. 中央, 中间, 腰部；a. 中央的, 中庸的, 中间的

words.translation: n. 种族, 人种, 赛跑, 比赛, 急流, 人类, 同道, 姜根；vi. 赛跑, 竞赛, 疾走

words.translation: n. 丝, 绸, 绸锻类, 丝织品；a. 丝的, 丝织的

words.translation: n. 街道, 马路, 街区；a. 街道的
words.definition: n. a thoroughfare (usually including sidewalks) that is lined with buildings

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的

words.translation: n. 全部, 全体, 整体, 完全之体系；a. 所有的, 完整的, 完全的, 纯粹的

words.translation: a. 年轻的, 无经验的, 朝气蓬勃的；n. 青年们, 幼小动物, 崽

words.translation: v. 吃, 腐蚀

words.translation: a. 快速的, 紧的；adv. 很快地, 紧紧地, 彻底地
words.definition: a. acting or moving or capable of acting or moving quickly

words.translation: adv. 几乎, 密切地

words.translation: n. 男孩
